Good morning @SoSoValueCrypto believers. I know you don't wanna miss the Juicy SoDex mainnet campaign. But here is some cool advice. 1️⃣ Don't borrow to trade on SoDex with hope you will make money and pay back. 2️⃣ Invest what you can afford to loose because nothing is certain in this space. 3️⃣ Don't only target volumes with hope it will cook. Trade like you need to make profit so incase things don't turn out well, your sanity will still be intact. 4️⃣ Because it's built by the same sosovalue team doesn't mean it can't disappoint. We are all riding on the reputation of their past actions towards the community. 5️⃣ Don't over stress yourself because you can't participate in this ongoing campaign. Not every opportunity you must grab. Some will definitely pass you by. Prepare for the next one because opportunities never cease in this space. @sodex_official Happy Sunday to you all.
